title: Eternal Rain
description:
A datapack that forces a thunderstorm to be constantly active.

Improves vibes and makes fishing more interesting.
body:
![The Eternal Night Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be545015c320d8cff2df4a0526183f2238b21d05.png)

___________________________________________________________________________________________________________


Inspired by my love of the rain.


![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcdfafa3fe29b7528f95ee5a33386ac9f05a9a59.png)

#### Do you have a weird feeling of nostalgia everytime it rains? Do you want to constantly have a good fishing loot? Do you want a cool challenge? Or are you just weird, and like the rain for no reason?
Do you wish for this thing to never end? If you do, don't worry. This datapack may come in handy.

#### The "Eternal Rain" datapack allows you to induce all your feelings towards the rain and thunder, by forcing an eternal thunderstorm on your world.

 
![how to use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84e771799def8f10137b5d52946f8a4bdf8964d6.png)

### Datapack was only tested on 1.20.

#### The best way to experience this mod is through things like:
- Realistic Shaders
- Resource Pack meant to mimic the look of Old Minecraft
- Horror mods like [The Man From the Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-man-from-the-fog), or [The Midnight Lurker](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-midnight-lurker)

 ![Other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e0e2200306060e24ec6632b4394db5b5ad680d.png)

 #### Feel free to modify the datapack to your liking
 #### If you want to make a video with this datapack, please credit I need clout 🙏
